empty.no_categorization_rules_yet: No categorization rules have been created yet. You will receive suggestions for rules to create as you categorize transactions in the bank feed.
empty.no_counterparties_yet: No counterparties yet. They will appear here automatically as your transactions are processed.

error.couldnt_load_data: We couldn’t load your categorization rules
error.load_affected_transactions: There was an error loading the affected transactions
error.load_categorization_rules: An error occurred while loading your categorization rules. Please check your connection and try again.
error.load_counterparties: Couldn’t load counterparties. Please try again.

label.transaction_no_longer_automatically_cate: Les transactions ne seront plus automatiquement catégorisées par cette règle. Les transactions déjà catégorisées sous {{counterparty}} ne seront pas touchées.

validation.amount_min_greater_than_max: Minimum amount must be less than or equal to maximum amount.
